calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Mark Romeo, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Michael Lingsch was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant Jose Quan and defaulted defendant Imelda Parra-Velasquez.
After hearing the testimony by counsel and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Principal $10,875.19
Prejudgment Interest $1,040.02
Attorney's Fees $1,650.00
Costs $655.40, for a Total of $14,220.61
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-04-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
